prestazioni: Engine swap to a Cosworth DFV 3.0L V8 (F1-spec, ~485 HP in period-correct trim) with a bespoke dry-sump system by Titan Motorsport, paired with a Hewland FG400 5-speed transaxle and a limited-slip differential from Quaife ATB

Custom fabricated titanium exhaust headers by Janspeed Engineering, terminating in a 4-into-1 stainless steel exhaust system with Inconel 625 tubing and a pair of custom-made Akrapovič titanium mufflers for weight reduction and optimized scavenging

Full chassis reinforcement with a T45 steel roll cage by Safety Devices, integrated with a bespoke carbon-fiber monocoque reinforcement panel kit by RML Group to enhance torsional rigidity while maintaining the original aluminum tub structure
estetica: Period-correct Gold Leaf Team Lotus livery with hand-painted pinstriping by RS Coachworks, featuring authentic 1970s Lotus decals and sponsor logos (e.g., Player’s No. 6, Firestone) sourced from Historic Racing Graphics

Custom-fabricated front and rear wings in carbon fiber by Aerodine Composites, designed to replicate the original 72’s high-downforce aero package but with modern CFD-optimized profiles for improved stability at high speeds

Bespoke magnesium wheels by Dymag, 13x15 front and 15x18 rear, wrapped in period-correct Firestone racing slicks (or modern Avon ACB9 compounds for vintage events), with custom center-lock hubs by AP Racing for rapid wheel changes
